{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T09:15:20.931Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130.jsonl","prompt":"explain Func<> , Action<> i Predicate<> usage in LINQ","cwd":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon"}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T09:16:54.798Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130.jsonl","prompt":"can you create a md file in Models dir where all model and their relationships are explained","cwd":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon"}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T09:17:19.388Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\4dc40a1e-da88-41ae-82da-245abcbba130.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon\\Models\\README.md","content":"# Hair Salon Management System - Data Models\n\nThis document explains all the models (entities) in the Hair Salon Management System and their relationships.\n\n## Overview\n\nThe system consists of 7 core models organized into:\n- **User Management**: User, UserRole\n- **Business**: HairSalon, Staff, Service, ServiceCategory\n- **Bookings**: Reservation, ReservationStatus\n- **Reviews**: Review\n\n---\n\n## Models\n\n### 1. User\n**Purpose**: Represents all users in the system (customers, staff, admins)\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic string Email { get; set; }\npublic string PasswordHash { get; set; }\npublic string FirstName { get; set; }\npublic string LastName { get; set; }\npublic string PhoneNumber { get; set; }\npublic UserRole Role { get; set; }  // Enum: Customer, Staff, Admin\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties** (Related Data):\n- `Staff` - If user is staff, links to Staff entity (1-to-1)\n- `CustomerReservations` - Reservations made by this customer (1-to-many)\n- `Reviews` - Reviews written by this customer (1-to-many)\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar user = new User \n{ \n    FirstName = \"John\", \n    Email = \"john@email.com\", \n    Role = UserRole.Customer \n};\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. UserRole (Enum)\n**Purpose**: Defines the role/type of user\n\n**Values**:\n```csharp\nCustomer  // Can book reservations\nStaff     // Works at salon\nAdmin     // Manages salon\n```\n\n**Usage**:\n```csharp\nif (user.Role == UserRole.Staff) { /* staff only logic */ }\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. HairSalon\n**Purpose**: Represents a physical hair salon location\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic string Name { get; set; }\npublic string Address { get; set; }\npublic string PhoneNumber { get; set; }\npublic string Email { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties**:\n- `Staff` - All staff members working at this salon (1-to-many)\n- `Services` - All services offered by this salon (1-to-many)\n\n**Relationships**:\n- ONE salon has MANY staff members\n- ONE salon has MANY services\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar salon = new HairSalon \n{ \n    Name = \"Premium Cuts Downtown\", \n    Address = \"123 Main Street\" \n};\nsalon.Staff.Add(staffMember);\nsalon.Services.Add(service);\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. Staff\n**Purpose**: Represents a staff member at a salon\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int UserId { get; set; }              // Foreign Key\npublic int HairSalonId { get; set; }         // Foreign Key\npublic string Specialization { get; set; }   // e.g., \"Hair Coloring\"\npublic decimal HourlyRate { get; set; }\npublic bool IsAvailable { get; set; }\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties**:\n- `User` - Links to User entity (1-to-1)\n- `HairSalon` - Links to HairSalon entity (many-to-1)\n- `Reservations` - All reservations for this staff member (1-to-many)\n\n**Relationships**:\n- ONE user can be ONE staff member (one-to-one)\n- MANY staff members work at ONE salon (many-to-one)\n- ONE staff member has MANY reservations (one-to-many)\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar staff = new Staff \n{ \n    UserId = 5,\n    HairSalonId = 1,\n    Specialization = \"Hair Coloring\",\n    HourlyRate = 50m\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. Service\n**Purpose**: Represents a service offered by a salon\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int HairSalonId { get; set; }         // Foreign Key\npublic string Name { get; set; }\npublic string Description { get; set; }\npublic decimal Price { get; set; }\npublic int DurationMinutes { get; set; }\npublic ServiceCategory Category { get; set; }  // Enum\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties**:\n- `HairSalon` - Salon offering this service (many-to-1)\n- `Reservations` - All reservations for this service (1-to-many)\n\n**Relationships**:\n- MANY services belong to ONE salon (many-to-one)\n- ONE service has MANY reservations (one-to-many)\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar service = new Service \n{ \n    HairSalonId = 1,\n    Name = \"Hair Coloring\",\n    Price = 120m,\n    DurationMinutes = 120,\n    Category = ServiceCategory.Coloring\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n### 6. ServiceCategory (Enum)\n**Purpose**: Categorizes types of services\n\n**Values**:\n```csharp\nHairCut\nColoring\nStyling\nTreatment\nBeard\nNails\nFacialTreatment\n```\n\n**Usage**:\n```csharp\nif (service.Category == ServiceCategory.HairCut) { /* ... */ }\n```\n\n---\n\n### 7. Reservation\n**Purpose**: Represents a booking made by a customer\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int CustomerId { get; set; }          // Foreign Key (User)\npublic int StaffId { get; set; }             // Foreign Key\npublic int ServiceId { get; set; }           // Foreign Key\npublic DateTime ReservationDateTime { get; set; }\npublic ReservationStatus Status { get; set; }  // Enum\npublic string Notes { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties**:\n- `Customer` - The customer making the reservation (many-to-1 User)\n- `Staff` - Staff member assigned to reservation (many-to-1)\n- `Service` - Service being booked (many-to-1)\n- `Reviews` - Reviews for this reservation (1-to-many)\n\n**Relationships**:\n- MANY reservations belong to ONE customer (many-to-one with User)\n- MANY reservations assigned to ONE staff (many-to-one)\n- MANY reservations for ONE service (many-to-one)\n- ONE reservation has MANY reviews (one-to-many)\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar reservation = new Reservation \n{ \n    CustomerId = 1,\n    StaffId = 2,\n    ServiceId = 3,\n    ReservationDateTime = new DateTime(2026, 4, 5, 10, 0, 0),\n    Status = ReservationStatus.Confirmed,\n    Notes = \"First time customer\"\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n### 8. ReservationStatus (Enum)\n**Purpose**: Tracks the status of a reservation\n\n**Values**:\n```csharp\nPending      // Waiting for confirmation\nConfirmed    // Confirmed appointment\nCompleted    // Service completed\nCancelled    // Customer cancelled\nNoShow       // Customer didn't show up\n```\n\n**Usage**:\n```csharp\nvar confirmed = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Status == ReservationStatus.Confirmed)\n    .ToList();\n```\n\n---\n\n### 9. Review\n**Purpose**: Customer reviews for completed services\n\n**Properties**:\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int ReservationId { get; set; }       // Foreign Key\npublic int CustomerId { get; set; }          // Foreign Key (User)\npublic int Rating { get; set; }              // 1-5 stars\npublic string Comment { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n```\n\n**Navigation Properties**:\n- `Reservation` - The reservation being reviewed (many-to-1)\n- `Customer` - The customer who wrote the review (many-to-1 User)\n\n**Relationships**:\n- MANY reviews for ONE reservation (many-to-one)\n- MANY reviews written by ONE customer (many-to-one with User)\n\n**Example**:\n```csharp\nvar review = new Review \n{ \n    ReservationId = 5,\n    CustomerId = 1,\n    Rating = 5,\n    Comment = \"Excellent service!\"\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## Entity Relationship Diagram\n\n```\nUser (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (1) Staff ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (1) HairSalon\n  ÔćĹ                     Ôćô\n  Ôöé              (many) Reservations\n  Ôöé                     Ôćô\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔö+ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (1) Service\n\nReservation (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (many) Reviews\n                              Ôćô\n                         Links to User & Reservation\n```\n\n**Detailed Relationships**:\n\n```\nHairSalon (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (many) Staff\n                              Ôćô\n                        Works at salon\n                        \n            ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (many) Services\n                     Offered by salon\n\nStaff (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔćĺ (many) Reservations\n                    Ôćô\nUser (Customer) ÔöÇÔćÉÔöÇ Reservation ÔöÇÔćĺ Service\n(1)        (many)        Ôćô\n                    (1) Review (many)\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key Relationships Summary\n\n| From | To | Type | Meaning |\n|------|----|----|---------|\n| User | Staff | 1-to-1 | A user can be one staff member |\n| User | Reservation | 1-to-many | A customer can have many reservations |\n| User | Review | 1-to-many | A customer can write many reviews |\n| HairSalon | Staff | 1-to-many | A salon has many staff members |\n| HairSalon | Service | 1-to-many | A salon offers many services |\n| Staff | Reservation | 1-to-many | A staff member has many reservations |\n| Service | Reservation | 1-to-many | A service can have many reservations |\n| Reservation | Review | 1-to-many | A reservation can have many reviews |\n\n---\n\n## Sample Data Flow\n\n### Creating a Reservation\n\n```csharp\n// 1. Customer (User with Role.Customer)\nvar customer = new User \n{ \n    FirstName = \"John\", \n    Role = UserRole.Customer \n};\n\n// 2. Salon\nvar salon = new HairSalon { Name = \"Premium Cuts\" };\n\n// 3. Staff at Salon\nvar staff = new Staff \n{ \n    User = customer,  // Actually different user\n    HairSalon = salon \n};\n\n// 4. Service at Salon\nvar service = new Service \n{ \n    HairSalon = salon,\n    Name = \"Hair Cut\",\n    Price = 60m\n};\n\n// 5. Reservation\nvar reservation = new Reservation \n{ \n    Customer = customer,\n    Staff = staff,\n    Service = service,\n    ReservationDateTime = new DateTime(2026, 4, 5, 10, 0, 0),\n    Status = ReservationStatus.Confirmed\n};\n\n// 6. Review (after service completed)\nvar review = new Review \n{ \n    Reservation = reservation,\n    Customer = customer,\n    Rating = 5,\n    Comment = \"Great service!\"\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## LINQ Query Examples Using Models\n\n```csharp\n// Get all reservations for a specific customer\nvar customerReservations = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Customer.Id == customerId)\n    .ToList();\n\n// Get staff with highest hourly rate\nvar topStaff = staff\n    .OrderByDescending(s => s.HourlyRate)\n    .First();\n\n// Get average rating for a service\nvar averageRating = reviews\n    .Where(r => r.Reservation.Service.Id == serviceId)\n    .Average(r => r.Rating);\n\n// Get all pending reservations for a salon\nvar pendingReservations = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Status == ReservationStatus.Pending \n        && r.Staff.HairSalon.Id == salonId)\n    .OrderBy(r => r.ReservationDateTime)\n    .ToList();\n```\n\n---\n\n## Notes\n\n- **Foreign Keys**: Fields ending in `Id` (UserId, HairSalonId, etc.) link to other entities\n- **Navigation Properties**: Non-primitive properties that reference other entities (User, Staff, etc.)\n- **Enums**: Used for fixed categories (Roles, Statuses, Categories)\n- **DateTime**: All timestamps use `DateTime.Now` for creation tracking\n- **Decimal**: Used for prices (better precision than float)\n\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_012VskUM3UCxi6LEst7qFEo5__vscode-1775119398914","cwd":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon"}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-15T17:02:29.079Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"674c888b-d240-4566-82c5-e9121466b1fa","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\674c888b-d240-4566-82c5-e9121466b1fa.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon\\.github\\agents\\UI expert.agent.md","oldString":"---\nname: UI expert\ndescription: Describe what this custom agent does and when to use it.\nargument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., \"a task to implement\" or \"a question to answer\".\n# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.\n---\n\n<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->\n\nDefine what this custom agent does, including its behavior, capabilities, and any specific instructions for its operation.","newString":"---\nname: UI expert\ndescription: \"Use when: implementing HTML, CSS, Razor views (.cshtml), layout changes, styling, UI components, visual design, or any front-end task in this project. Follows the project's 60s/70s high-end barbershop aesthetic: Rich Mahogany, Amber Glass, Toasted Oak, and Brass Gold palette with leather textures and vintage density.\"\nargument-hint: \"Describe the UI change or component you want built or updated (e.g., 'create a reservation card component', 'restyle the navbar', 'add a services grid page').\"\nmodel: gemini-2.5-pro\ntools: [read, edit, search, todo]\n---\n\nYou are the UI Expert for **manage-my-hairsaloon**, an ASP.NET Core MVC application (.NET 8) using Razor views and Bootstrap 5. Your sole responsibility is front-end work: HTML, CSS, and `.cshtml` view files.\n\n## Style System ÔÇö 60s/70s High-End Barbershop\n\nAll UI work must conform to this design language. Never deviate without explicit user instruction.\n\n### Color Palette\n| Role | Color | Hex |\n|---|---|---|\n| Primary background | Rich Mahogany | `#4E1A0E` |\n| Secondary background | Toasted Oak | `#7B4F2E` |\n| Accent / highlight | Brass Gold | `#C9A84C` |\n| Warm glow / glass | Amber Glass | `#D97B2B` |\n| Text on dark | Cream Parchment | `#F5ECD7` |\n| Text muted | Warm Sand | `#B89A6A` |\n| Dark surface | Smoked Walnut | `#1C0F09` |\n\n### Typography\n- **Headings**: Serif with character ÔÇö prefer `Playfair Display`, `Libre Baskerville`, or `Cormorant Garamond` (load from Google Fonts if not yet present)\n- **Body / UI text**: Elegant sans-serif ÔÇö prefer `Raleway`, `Josefin Sans`, or `Lato`\n- **All caps + wide letter-spacing** (`letter-spacing: 0.15em`) for nav items, labels, section titles\n- Headings should feel engraved or typeset, not digital\n\n### Textures & Surfaces\n- Use `leather-texture` CSS class (dark leather pattern via CSS `background-image` or SVG noise) on main backgrounds and cards\n- Subtle `box-shadow` in warm amber/gold tones ÔÇö no cold blue shadows\n- Borders and dividers in Brass Gold (`1ÔÇô2px solid #C9A84C`), with occasional ornamental `::before`/`::after` pseudo-elements (e.g., diamond `ÔŚć` or rule `ÔÇö`)\n- Cards and panels: dark Mahogany or Walnut background, Brass Gold border, slight inner glow\n\n### Density & Vintage Authenticity\n- Layouts should feel **rich and layered** ÔÇö avoid flat whitespace-heavy modern minimalism\n- Use decorative horizontal rules between sections\n- Favor **grid layouts with 3ÔÇô4 columns** for service/staff listings\n- Include visual hierarchy via ornamental headers (e.g., a thin rule above and below a centered title)\n- Icons/illustrations should lean vintage (scissors, combs, razors, barbershop poles) ÔÇö use unicode or icon fonts if SVGs are unavailable\n\n## Project Conventions\n\n- Framework: **ASP.NET Core MVC** ÔÇö views live in `Views/`, shared layout in `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n- CSS: global styles in `wwwroot/css/site.css`, page-specific styles in `<style>` blocks inside the view or a dedicated `.css` file\n- Bootstrap 5 is available ÔÇö extend it; do not fight it; use utility classes but override with custom CSS variables and classes where needed\n- Razor syntax: use `@ViewData[\"Title\"]`, `asp-*` tag helpers, `@Html.*` where appropriate\n- Before adding a new page, check existing views for patterns (nav items, layouts, form structure) to stay consistent\n\n## Workflow\n\n1. **Read first**: Before editing any file, read the relevant view, layout, and `site.css` to understand existing structure\n2. **Search for patterns**: Use `search` to find other views using similar components so your work is consistent across the app\n3. **Edit minimally**: Only change what is needed. {"timestamp":"2026-04-15T17:22:10.914Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon\\Program.cs","oldString":"using manage_my_hairsaloon.Models;\nusing manage_my_hairsaloon.Repositories;\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\n// Add services to the container.\nbuilder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\n// Configure the HTTP request pipeline.\nif (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n{\n    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n    app.UseHsts();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\napp.UseStaticFiles();\n\napp.UseRouting();\n\napp.UseAuthorization();\n\n// ===== REPOSITORIES =====\nvar salonRepo = new MockHairSalonRepository();\nvar reservationRepo = new MockReservationRepository();\n\nvar salons = salonRepo.GetAll();\nvar reservations = reservationRepo.GetAll();\n\n// ===== LINQ QUERIES =====\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"=== HAIR SALON MANAGEMENT SYSTEM ===\\n\");\n\n// 1. Get all confirmed reservations\nvar confirmedReservations = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Status == ReservationStatus.Confirmed)\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"Ôťô Confirmed Reservations: {confirmedReservations.Count}\");\nforeach (var res in confirmedReservations)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {res.Customer.FirstName} on {res.ReservationDateTime:yyyy-MM-dd}\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 2. Get all reservations sorted by date\nvar reservationsByDate = reservations\n    .OrderBy(r => r.ReservationDateTime)\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čôů Reservations by Date:\");\nforeach (var res in reservationsByDate.Take(3))\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {res.ReservationDateTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}: {res.Service.Name}\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 3. Find reservations for a specific customer\nvar customerReservations = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.CustomerId == 1)\n    .Select(r => new { r.Service.Name, r.ReservationDateTime, r.Status })\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čĹĄ John Doe's Reservations: {customerReservations.Count}\");\nforeach (var res in customerReservations)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {res.Name} ({res.Status})\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 4. Get staff members by salon\nvar premiumCutsStaff = salons\n    .FirstOrDefault(s => s.Name == \"Premium Cuts Downtown\")\n    ?.Staff\n    .OrderBy(s => s.Specialization)\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čĹą Premium Cuts Downtown Staff:\");\nif (premiumCutsStaff != null)\n{\n    foreach (var staff in premiumCutsStaff)\n    {\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  - {staff.User.FirstName} ({staff.Specialization})\");\n    }\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 5. Find the most expensive service\nvar mostExpensiveService = salons\n    .SelectMany(s => s.Services)\n    .OrderByDescending(s => s.Price)\n    .First();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čĺÄ Most Expensive Service: {mostExpensiveService.Name} - ${mostExpensiveService.Price}\\n\");\n\n// 6. Count reservations per staff member\nvar reservationsPerStaff = reservations\n    .GroupBy(r => r.Staff.User.FirstName)\n    .Select(g => new { StaffName = g.Key, Count = g.Count() })\n    .OrderByDescending(x => x.Count)\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čôŐ Reservations per Staff Member:\");\nforeach (var staff in reservationsPerStaff)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {staff.StaffName}: {staff.Count} reservations\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 7. Get all services under $60\nvar affordableServices = salons\n    .SelectMany(s => s.Services)\n    .Where(s => s.Price < 60)\n    .Select(s => new { s.Name, s.Price, s.Category })\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čĺ- Services Under $60: {affordableServices.Count}\");\nforeach (var service in affordableServices)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {service.Name}: ${service.Price}\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 8. Find pending reservations that need confirmation\nvar pendingReservations = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Status == ReservationStatus.Pending)\n    .OrderBy(r => r.ReservationDateTime)\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"ÔĆ- Pending Reservations: {pendingReservations.Count}\");\nforeach (var res in pendingReservations)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {res.Customer.FirstName} - {res.Service.Name}\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 9. Get services by category\nvar servicesByCategory = salons\n    .SelectMany(s => s.Services)\n    .GroupBy(s => s.Category)\n    .Select(g => new { Category = g.Key, ServiceCount = g.Count() })\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čĆĚ´ŞĆ  Services by Category:\");\nforeach (var cat in servicesByCategory)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {cat.Category}: {cat.ServiceCount} services\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 10. Get average service price per salon\nvar avgPricePerSalon = salons\n    .Select(s => new \n    { \n        SalonName = s.Name, \n        AveragePrice = s.Services.Any() ? s.Services.Average(srv => srv.Price) : 0 \n    })\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"­čôł Average Service Price per Salon:\");\nforeach (var salon in avgPricePerSalon)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {salon.SalonName}: ${salon.AveragePrice:F2}\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 11. Find top 3 staff with highest hourly rate\nvar topStaff = salons\n    .SelectMany(s => s.Staff)\n    .OrderByDescending(s => s.HourlyRate)\n    .Take(3)\n    .Select(s => new { s.User.FirstName, s.Specialization, s.HourlyRate })\n    .ToList();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"ÔşÉ Top 3 Best Paid Staff:\");\nforeach (var staff in topStaff)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  - {staff.FirstName} ({staff.Specialization}): ${staff.HourlyRate}/hr\");\n}\nConsole.WriteLine();\n\n// 12. Count completed reservations\nvar completedCount = reservations\n    .Where(r => r.Status == ReservationStatus.Completed)\n    .Count();\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"Ôťů Total Completed Reservations: {completedCount}\\n\");\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"default\",\n    pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n\napp.Run();","newString":"using manage_my_hairsaloon.Repositories;\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\n// Add services to the container.\nbuilder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n\n// Register mock repositories\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockUserRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockHairSalonRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockStaffRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockServiceRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockReservationRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockReviewRepository>();\n\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\n// Configure the HTTP request pipeline.\nif (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n{\n    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n    app.UseHsts();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\napp.UseStaticFiles();\n\napp.UseRouting();\n\napp.UseAuthorization();\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"default\",\n    pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n\napp.Run();"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_016NodjXWMaNmof6kuDDdLQU__vscode-1776269617030","cwd":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon"}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-15T17:23:15.952Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c.jsonl","tool_name":"runSubagent","tool_input":{"agentName":"UI expert","description":"Create all views and layout","prompt":"I need you to create ALL the Razor views and update the layout for a hair salon management app. The backend controllers and models are already in place. Here's what I need:\n\n## Project Context\n- ASP.NET Core MVC (.NET 8), Bootstrap 5, Razor views\n- Workspace root: c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon\n\n## What to Create\n\n### 1. Update `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\nAdd a navigation menu with links to ALL pages:\n- Home (controller: Home, action: Index)\n- Hair Salons (controller: HairSalons, action: Index)\n- Staff (controller: Staff, action: Index)  \n- Services (controller: Services, action: Index)\n- Reservations (controller: Reservations, action: Index)\n- Users (controller: Users, action: Index)\n- Reviews (controller: Reviews, action: Index)\n\n### 2. Update `Views/Home/Index.cshtml`\nA dashboard/landing page for the hair salon management system. Show summary stats (counts of salons, staff, services, reservations) with links to each section.\n\n### 3. Create `Views/Users/Index.cshtml`\n- @model List&lt;manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.User&gt;\n- Data table showing: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, PhoneNumber, Role, CreatedAt\n- Each row has a \"Details\" link: asp-controller=\"Users\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@user.Id\"\n\n### 4. Create `Views/Users/Details.cshtml`\n- @model manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.User\n- Show all user properties\n- If user has CustomerReservations, show them in a list with links to reservation details\n- Back to list link\n\n### 5. Create `Views/HairSalons/Index.cshtml`\n- @model List&lt;manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.HairSalon&gt;\n- Data table showing: Id, Name, Address, PhoneNumber, Email, CreatedAt\n- Each row has a \"Details\" link: asp-controller=\"HairSalons\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id\n\n### 6. Create `Views/HairSalons/Details.cshtml`\n- @model manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.HairSalon\n- Show all salon properties\n- List of Staff members at this salon (with links to staff details)\n- List of Services at this salon (with links to service details)\n- Back to list link\n\n### 7. Create `Views/Staff/Index.cshtml`\n- @model List&lt;manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.Staff&gt;\n- Data table showing: Id, User.FirstName + User.LastName (Name), Specialization, HourlyRate, IsAvailable, HairSalon.Name\n- Each row has a \"Details\" link: asp-controller=\"Staff\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id\n\n### 8. Create `Views/Reservations/Details.cshtml`\n- @model manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.Reservation\n- Show all reservation properties with links to Customer (Users/Details), Staff (Staff/Details), Service (Services/Details)\n- Show Reviews if any\n- Back to list link\n\n### 13. Notes { get; set; }\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n\n        public User? Customer { get; set; }\n        public Staff? Staff { get; set; }\n        public Service? {"timestamp":"2026-04-15T18:17:37.257Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\misla\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\f442918b69b7be1a95b300561227d406\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\65bc2d83-77de-458d-86fa-cd849257710c.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon\\lab\\README.md","content":"# Hair Salon Management System ÔÇö Lab Documentation\n\nThis document covers everything built during this session: data models, repositories, controllers, and views.\n\n---\n\n## How to Run\n\n```\ndotnet run\n```\n\nNavigate to `https://localhost:{port}` (shown in terminal on startup). The app opens on the Home dashboard.\n\n---\n\n## Data Models\n\nThe system has 6 entity classes and 2 enums, all in `Models/`.\n\n### User\nRepresents all users ÔÇö customers, staff, and admins.\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic string? Email { get; set; }\npublic string? PasswordHash { get; set; }\npublic string? FirstName { get; set; }\npublic string? LastName { get; set; }\npublic string? PhoneNumber { get; set; }\npublic UserRole Role { get; set; }          // Enum: Customer, Staff, Admin\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic Staff? Staff { get; set; }                          // 1-to-1 if user is staff\npublic List<Reservation> CustomerReservations { get; set; } // reservations they made\npublic List<Review> Reviews { get; set; }                   // reviews they wrote\n```\n\n### UserRole (Enum)\n```csharp\nCustomer   // Can book reservations\nStaff      // Works at a salon\nAdmin      // Manages the system\n```\n\n### HairSalon\nRepresents a physical salon location.\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic string? Name { get; set; }\npublic string? Address { get; set; }\npublic string? PhoneNumber { get; set; }\npublic string? Email { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic List<Staff> Staff { get; set; }       // all staff at this salon\npublic List<Service> Services { get; set; }  // all services offered here\n```\n\n### Staff\nLinks a User to a HairSalon as an employee.\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int UserId { get; set; }       // FK Ôćĺ User\npublic int HairSalonId { get; set; }  // FK Ôćĺ HairSalon\npublic string? Specialization { get; set; }\npublic decimal HourlyRate { get; set; }\npublic bool IsAvailable { get; set; }\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic User? User { get; set; }\npublic HairSalon? HairSalon { get; set; }\npublic List<Reservation> Reservations { get; set; }  // appointments assigned to them\n```\n\n### Service\nA service offered by a salon (haircut, coloring, etc.).\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int HairSalonId { get; set; }  // FK Ôćĺ HairSalon\npublic string? Name { get; set; }\npublic string? Description { get; set; }\npublic decimal Price { get; set; }\npublic int DurationMinutes { get; set; }\npublic ServiceCategory Category { get; set; }  // Enum\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic HairSalon? HairSalon { get; set; }\npublic List<Reservation> Reservations { get; set; }\n```\n\n### ServiceCategory (Enum)\n```csharp\nHairCut | Coloring | Styling | Treatment | Beard | Nails | FacialTreatment\n```\n\n### Reservation\nA booking by a customer for a specific service with a specific staff member.\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int CustomerId { get; set; }  // FK Ôćĺ User\npublic int StaffId { get; set; }     // FK Ôćĺ Staff\npublic int ServiceId { get; set; }   // FK Ôćĺ Service\npublic DateTime ReservationDateTime { get; set; }\npublic ReservationStatus Status { get; set; }  // Enum\npublic string? Notes { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic User? Customer { get; set; }\npublic Staff? Staff { get; set; }\npublic Service? Service { get; set; }\npublic List<Review> Reviews { get; set; }\n```\n\n### ReservationStatus (Enum)\n```csharp\nPending     // Waiting for confirmation\nConfirmed   // Appointment confirmed\nCompleted   // Service delivered\nCancelled   // Customer cancelled\nNoShow      // Customer didn't show up\n```\n\n### Review\nA customer's rating and comment for a completed reservation.\n\n```csharp\npublic int Id { get; set; }\npublic int ReservationId { get; set; }  // FK Ôćĺ Reservation\npublic int CustomerId { get; set; }     // FK Ôćĺ User\npublic int Rating { get; set; }         // 1ÔÇô5\npublic string? Comment { get; set; }\npublic DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n\n// Navigation properties\npublic Reservation? Reservation { get; set; }\npublic User? Customer { get; set; }\n```\n\n---\n\n## Entity Relationships\n\n```\nHairSalon (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (many) Staff ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (many) Reservations ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (many) Reviews\nHairSalon (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (many) Services ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś\nUser (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (many) Reservations (as Customer)\nUser (1) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ (1) Staff\n```\n\n| From | To | Type | Meaning |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| HairSalon | Staff | 1-to-many | A salon employs many staff |\n| HairSalon | Service | 1-to-many | A salon offers many services |\n| User | Staff | 1-to-1 | A staff-role user has one staff profile |\n| User | Reservation | 1-to-many | A customer can have many reservations |\n| User | Review | 1-to-many | A customer can write many reviews |\n| Staff | Reservation | 1-to-many | A staff member handles many reservations |\n| Service | Reservation | 1-to-many | A service can be booked many times |\n| Reservation | Review | 1-to-many | A reservation can receive many reviews |\n\n### How reservations relate back to a salon\n\nThere is no direct `HairSalonId` on `Reservation`. The path is:\n\n```\nHairSalon Ôćĺ Staff[] Ôćĺ Reservations[]\n```\n\nIn Razor views this is written with `SelectMany`:\n\n```csharp\nvar salonReservations = Model.Staff\n    .SelectMany(s => s.Reservations)\n    .ToList();\n```\n\n---\n\n## Repositories\n\nAll repositories live in `Repositories/` and read from the static `MockDataStore`. They are **not** connected to a database ÔÇö all data is hardcoded in memory.\n\n| Repository | Methods |\n|---|---|\n| `MockUserRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetByRole(role)`, `GetCustomers()`, `GetStaffUsers()`, `GetByEmail(email)` |\n| `MockHairSalonRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetByName(name)` |\n| `MockStaffRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetBySalonId(id)`, `GetByUserId(id)`, `GetAvailable()` |\n| `MockServiceRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetBySalonId(id)`, `GetByCategory(cat)`, `GetByMaxPrice(price)` |\n| `MockReservationRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetByCustomerId(id)`, `GetByStaffId(id)`, `GetByStatus(status)`, `GetByServiceId(id)` |\n| `MockReviewRepository` | `GetAll()`, `GetById(id)`, `GetByReservationId(id)`, `GetByCustomerId(id)` |\n\n### MockDataStore\n\n`Repositories/MockDataStore.cs` is a static class whose constructor builds all in-memory data: 3 salons, 5 staff members (linked to user accounts), 9 services, 9 reservations, 0 reviews (empty list). All navigation properties are wired up manually (e.g. `salon1.Staff.Add(staffSalon1_1)`).\n\n### Dependency injection\n\nRepositories are registered as singletons in `Program.cs`:\n\n```csharp\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockUserRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockHairSalonRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockStaffRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockServiceRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockReservationRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MockReviewRepository>();\n```\n\nThey are injected into controllers via constructor injection:\n\n```csharp\npublic class UsersController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly MockUserRepository _userRepo;\n\n    public UsersController(MockUserRepository userRepo)\n    {\n        _userRepo = userRepo;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Controllers and Views\n\nEach entity has its own controller with `Index` (list) and `Details` (single item) actions.\n\n| Controller | Route | What it shows |\n|---|---|---|\n| `HomeController` | `/` | Dashboard with counts |\n| `UsersController` | `/Users` | All users table + detail page |\n| `HairSalonsController` | `/HairSalons` | All salons + detail (with staff, services, reservations, reviews) |\n| `StaffController` | `/Staff` | All staff + detail (with reservations) |\n| `ServicesController` | `/Services` | All services + detail (with reservations) |\n| `ReservationsController` | `/Reservations` | All reservations + detail |\n| `ReviewsController` | `/Reviews` | All reviews + detail |\n\n### How data flows from controller to view\n\n1. Controller calls the repository: `var users = _userRepo.GetAll();`\n2. Passes the model to the view: `return View(users);`\n3. View declares the model type at the top: `@model List<manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.User>`\n4. View iterates or displays the data with Razor syntax: `@user.FirstName`\n\nExample for a detail page:\n\n```csharp\n// Controller\npublic IActionResult Details(int id)\n{\n    var salon = _salonRepo.GetById(id);\n    if (salon == null) return NotFound();\n    return View(salon);       // passes HairSalon object to view\n}\n```\n\n```html\n<!-- View -->\n@model manage_my_hairsaloon.Models.HairSalon\n\n<h1>@Model.Name</h1>\n<p>@Model.Address</p>\n\n@foreach (var staff in Model.Staff)\n{\n    <p>@staff.User?.FirstName ÔÇö @staff.Specialization</p>\n}\n```\n\n### Views folder structure\n\n```\nViews/\n  Home/           Index.cshtml (dashboard)\n  Users/          Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  HairSalons/     Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  Staff/          Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  Services/       Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  Reservations/   Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  Reviews/        Index.cshtml, Details.cshtml\n  Shared/         _Layout.cshtml (nav + page shell)\n```\n\n### Back navigation (returnUrl pattern)\n\nWhen navigating from a detail page to a child detail page, a `returnUrl` query parameter is passed:\n\n```html\n<a asp-controller=\"Staff\" asp-action=\"Details\"\n   asp-route-id=\"@staff.Id\"\n   asp-route-returnUrl=\"@Context.Request.PathBase@Context.Request.Path\">\n   Details\n</a>\n```\n\nThe target detail page reads it and uses it for the back link:\n\n```csharp\nvar returnUrl = Context.Request.Query[\"returnUrl\"].FirstOrDefault();\n```\n\n```html\n@if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(returnUrl) && Url.IsLocalUrl(returnUrl))\n{\n    <a href=\"@returnUrl\">ÔćÉ Back</a>\n}\nelse\n{\n    <a asp-controller=\"Staff\" asp-action=\"Index\">ÔćÉ Back to Staff</a>\n}\n```\n\n`Url.IsLocalUrl()` validates the URL to prevent open-redirect attacks.\n\n---\n\n## UI / Styling\n\nAll styling lives in `wwwroot/css/site.css`. The design follows a **60s/70s high-end barbershop** aesthetic:\n\n| Role | Color |\n|---|---|\n| Primary background | Rich Mahogany `#4E1A0E` |\n| Secondary background | Toasted Oak `#7B4F2E` |\n| Accent / highlight | Brass Gold `#C9A84C` |\n| Warm glow | Amber Glass `#D97B2B` |\n| Text on dark | Cream Parchment `#F5ECD7` |\n\nThe background has a repeating SVG pattern of barbershop icons (scissors, razor, mustache, comb, pole) in brass gold at very low opacity for texture.\n\nGoogle Fonts used: `Playfair Display` (headings) and `Raleway` (body).\n\n---\n\n## Mock Data Summary\n\n| Entity | Count |\n|---|---|\n| Users | 8 (3 customers, 5 staff) |\n| HairSalons | 3 |\n| Staff | 5 |\n| Services | 9 |\n| Reservations | 9 |\n| Reviews | 0 |\n\n### Salons and staff\n\n| Salon | Staff |\n|---|---|\n| Premium Cuts Downtown | Anna Wilson (Hair Coloring), Bob Brown (Hair Cut & Styling) |\n| Beauty Oasis Mall | Sarah Davis (Beard Grooming), Tom Miller (Nails & Extensions) |\n| Elegant Styles Uptown | Lucy Taylor (Facial Treatments) |\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01X9dHnEzZkADxQeHG1tKMhL__vscode-1776269617155","cwd":"c:\\Users\\misla\\source\\repos\\manage-my-hairsaloon"}
